# 簡易智能狀態測驗完整回覆範例 - 臺灣長期照顧實作指引(TW LTC IG) v1.0.0

* **簡易智能狀態測驗完整回覆範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 簡易智能狀態測驗完整回覆範例

Profile: [長期照顧－簡易智能狀態測驗回覆](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseMMSE.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-mmse-complete-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[簡易智能狀態測驗](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-mmse.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 今年是那一年?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-2
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 現在是什麼季節?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-3
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 今天是幾號?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-4
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 今天是禮拜幾?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-5
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 現在是那一個月份?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-6
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 我們現在是在那一個省?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-7
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 我們現在是在那一個縣、市?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-8
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 這裡屬於哪一個區或是鄉鎮?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-9
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 這個社區單位(醫院、診所)的名稱?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-10
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 現在我們是在幾樓?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-11
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請重複這三個名稱,按第一次複述結果計分
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 3
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-12
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請從100開始連續減7,一直減7直到我說停為止。(每減對一次得一分)
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 5
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-13
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 藍色
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-14
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 悲傷
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-15
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 火車
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-16
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): (拿出手錶)這是什麼?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-17
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): (拿出鉛筆)這是什麼?
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-18
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請跟我唸一句話『白紙真正寫黑字』
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-19
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請唸一遍並做做看『請閉上眼睛』
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-20
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請用左/右手(非利手)拿這張紙(三步驟指令,每對一步驟得一分)
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 3
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-21
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請在紙上寫一句語意完整的句子。(含主詞動詞且語意完整的句子)
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MMSE-22
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 這裡有一個圖形,請在旁邊畫出一個相同的圖形。(兩五邊形,交一四邊形,有兩交點,則給分)
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

    "text" : "我們現在是在那一個省?",

    }]
  },

    "linkId" : "MMSE-7",
    "text" : "我們現在是在那一個縣、市?",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-8",
    "text" : "這裡屬於哪一個區或是鄉鎮?",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-9",
    "text" : "這個社區單位(醫院、診所)的名稱?",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-10",
    "text" : "現在我們是在幾樓?",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-11",
    "text" : "請重複這三個名稱,按第一次複述結果計分",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 3
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-12",
    "text" : "請從100開始連續減7,一直減7直到我說停為止。(每減對一次得一分)",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 5
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-13",
    "text" : "藍色",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-14",
    "text" : "悲傷",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-15",
    "text" : "火車",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-16",
    "text" : "(拿出手錶)這是什麼?",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-17",
    "text" : "(拿出鉛筆)這是什麼?",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-18",
    "text" : "請跟我唸一句話『白紙真正寫黑字』",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-19",
    "text" : "請唸一遍並做做看『請閉上眼睛』",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-20",
    "text" : "請用左/右手(非利手)拿這張紙(三步驟指令,每對一步驟得一分)",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 3
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-21",
    "text" : "請在紙上寫一句語意完整的句子。(含主詞動詞且語意完整的句子)",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "MMSE-22",
    "text" : "這裡有一個圖形,請在旁邊畫出一個相同的圖形。(兩五邊形,交一四邊形,有兩交點,則給分)",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueInteger" : 1
    }]
  }]
